episodes.title: House Oversight Committee questions Bill Gates on connections with Jeffrey Epstein
episodes.description:
The Microsoft cofounder said he was not friends with Epstein, only that Epstein suggested at several dinners he could help raise money for philanthropic endeavors.

episodes.title: Epstein scandal looms over King Charles' visit
episodes.description:
King Charles' high-profile visit to the United States does not include at least one requested meeting. A bipartisan group of lawmakers requested that Charles meet with survivors of convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. But Charles' team says that won't happen. ABC's Alex Stone reports.

episodes.title: First Lady Melania Trump denies any connection to Jeffrey Epstein
episodes.description:
The First Lady spoke at the White House on Thursday, insisting she was not "Epstein's victim" and that he did not introduce her to her husband, Donald Trump.

episodes.title: Deposition of Epstein's former accountant
episodes.description:
The longtime accountant of disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein was deposed by the House Oversight Committee on Wednesday. Members hope to learn how Epstein was able to build his multi-million-dollar fortune. ABC's Reena Roy has the latest.
